title: Midnight Delight Potato Delicacy
description: A simple, elegant dish that combines the earthy sweetness of potatoes with the vibrant flavors of red ingredients.

ingredients.name: potato
ingredients.notes: any variety, but high-starch works best

instructions: Toss diced potatoes with a drizzle of oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
In a large skillet, sauté sliced red bell peppers over medium heat until tender.
Add cooked black beans to the skillet and stir to combine.
Once potatoes are done roasting, add them to the skillet and stir to combine.
Top with crumbled feta cheese (if using) and serve hot.
